title: Spell Phase 1 Package 4: combat simulator deterministic spell pilot
body: Use the exact Jules prompt packet in docs/tasks/spells/PACKAGE_4_COMBAT_SIMULATOR_DETERMINISTIC_PILOT_JULES_PROMPT.md. Scope: prove a representative deterministic combat spell path for early-game spells using damage, healing, and simple buff/status pilots through the combat simulator runtime. Worker: Jules. Branch: jules/spells-package4-combat-deterministic-pilot. Do not broaden into all level 2-3 mechanics, AI arbitration policy, character creator UI, character sheet spellbook UI, broad premade roster semantics, or Symphony orchestration files. Record any level 2-3 fixture, mechanics bucket, Atlas source, or arbitration discoveries as follow-up gaps.
